name: Assyrian people
description: A white field with a four-pointed golden star at the centre and wavy blue, red and gold rays reaching to the corners, the god Ashur above.
history: The Assyrian flag, designed in 1968 and adopted by Assyrian organisations; the rays represent the rivers of the Assyrian homeland and the star the light of the sun.

features.role: wavy blue, red and gold rays to the corners; the god Ashur above
